title: Ability to Pin items in Workspaces
excerpt: It would be ideal if there was a feature that allowed us to “pin” boards, forms, dashboards, etc. within a given Workspace so they always appear at the top within the Workspace. This would help with ensuring key items ar…

posts.author: linkdargri (Lindsey)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be ideal if there was a feature that allowed us to “pin” boards, forms, dashboards, etc. within a given Workspace so they always appear at the top within the Workspace. This would help with ensuring key items are easier to find.
